title: Verify or fix Temporal worker health false-negative diagnostics

tasks.title: Verify current live worker health/diagnose behavior and inspect source/test coverage for alive-but-reported-dead false negatives.
tasks.verification: Captured live current evidence: adv_status view=health reports Worker process: healthy and Queue serviceability: serviceable (combined); adv_temporal_diagnose reports serverReachable true, workerAlive true, recommendedNextAction 'Temporal is healthy'. Inspected source and found formatter still labels worker_process_alive=false as degraded even when queue_serviceability is serviceable with no blockers. Added failing regression in tool-formatters.test.ts for peer-owned serviceable queue display; red test confirms issue remains uncovered/failing.
tasks.summary: Captured live current evidence: adv_status view=health reports Worker process: healthy and Queue serviceability: serviceable (combined); adv_temporal_diagnose reports serverReachable true, workerAlive true, recommendedNextAction 'Temporal is healthy'. Inspected source and found formatter still labels worker_process_alive=false as degraded even when queue_serviceability is serviceable with no blockers. Added failing regression in tool-formatters.test.ts for peer-owned serviceable queue display; red test confirms issue remains uncovered/failing.
tasks.implementation_summary: Captured live current evidence: adv_status view=health reports Worker process: healthy and Queue serviceability: serviceable (combined); adv_temporal_diagnose reports serverReachable true, workerAlive true, recommendedNextAction 'Temporal is healthy'. Inspected source and found formatter still labels worker_process_alive=false as degraded even when queue_serviceability is serviceable with no blockers. Added failing regression in tool-formatters.test.ts for peer-owned serviceable queue display; red test confirms issue remains uncovered/failing.

tasks.title: Add regression/fix only if stale PID/lock/queue-serviceability false-negative path remains uncovered or reproducible.
tasks.verification: Implemented serviceability-first status formatting: if worker_process_alive is false but queue_serviceability.status is serviceable and has no blockers, formatted health now reports 'Worker process: peer-owned, serviceable' instead of degraded. Preserves degraded output for non-serviceable/blocked queues and healthy output for locally alive worker. Regression test now passes.
tasks.summary: Implemented serviceability-first status formatting: if worker_process_alive is false but queue_serviceability.status is serviceable and has no blockers, formatted health now reports 'Worker process: peer-owned, serviceable' instead of degraded. Preserves degraded output for non-serviceable/blocked queues and healthy output for locally alive worker. Regression test now passes.
tasks.implementation_summary: Implemented serviceability-first status formatting: if worker_process_alive is false but queue_serviceability.status is serviceable and has no blockers, formatted health now reports 'Worker process: peer-owned, serviceable' instead of degraded. Preserves degraded output for non-serviceable/blocked queues and healthy output for locally alive worker. Regression test now passes.

tasks.title: Run focused health/diagnose verification and plugin check; document closure or remaining failure evidence.
tasks.verification: pnpm test --run src/utils/tool-formatters.test.ts src/temporal/queue-serviceability.test.ts exited 0; pnpm run check exited 0.

wisdom.content: Temporal health UI should be serviceability-first: if queue_serviceability.status is serviceable and blockers are empty, local worker_process_alive=false is peer/informational, not user-facing degraded. Keep raw field for diagnostics; format summary from queue serviceability verdict.

proposal.approval_evidence: Batch accepted by user in OpenCode chat; structured GH response posted.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed autonomously from issue #33, proposal, live diagnose/status evidence, and project context. Current Temporal health is healthy; verify-first path selected with no HITL tradeoff.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed autonomously. Plan captures live evidence, inspects health-check coverage, and only adds code/tests if alive-but-dead false-negative path remains reproducible or uncovered.

planning.approval_evidence: Approved via structured ADV_ATC_RESPONSE on GitHub issue #33.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete. Live evidence: adv_status view=health reported healthy/serviceable; adv_temporal_diagnose recommended Temporal is healthy. Source inspection found formatted status still treated worker_process_alive=false as degraded even when queue_serviceability is serviceable with no blockers. Added red regression for peer-owned serviceable status, fixed formatter to render 'Worker process: peer-owned, serviceable', and verified. Tests: pnpm test --run src/utils/tool-formatters.test.ts src/temporal/queue-serviceability.test.ts passed; pnpm run check passed. Checkpoint commit c35509954645d958f5584b26e3339747576070f1.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Batch acceptance approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes

release.approval_evidence: Batch release approved via GH ATC_RESPONSE for all bug changes

clarify_findings.message: Proposal describes behavior that could fail but doesn't mention error handling or rollback. What happens when things go wrong?
